texto: Lost…What if all of the folklore elements your grandfather spoke of—actually were?What if there was only a paper thin separation of less than one degree?Who would save you? How would you survive?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Troy T. Tabor que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Lost…What if all of the folklore elements your grandfather spoke of—actually were?What if there w…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fantasy-fiction, would, com foco em reflexao.
